calendar.matters:
Second Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul L. Warner, Esq., 415.398.8080, for plaintiff Jeffer Mangels Butler.
William K. Brewer, Esq., 619.291.6558, for defendant Jeffer Hardesty.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PETITIONER JEFFER MANGELS BUTLER & MITCHELL LLP'S Second Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Second Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-16-2012 Continued To Dec-07-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PETITIONER JEFFER MANGELS BUTLER & MITCHELL LLP's Second Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration is Continued to December 7, 2012 per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul L. Warner, Esq. of Jeffer Mangels Butler & Mitchell LLP, Tel. 415.398.8080, for Petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER JEFFER MANGELS BUTLER & MITCHELL LLP's Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration Pursuant to CCP 1281.2 is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
